betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Basic Backpack§f

§aUpgrade your inventory space and take your base's resources with you on long expeditions!§f
The §9Iron Backpacks§f mod introduces tiered, wearable, and highly customizable backpack storage. As you progress from basic materials to diamonds, you can expand both your inventory slots and the capacity to equip specialized functional upgrades.

§6Basic Backpack§f:
The entry-level tier. Provides §e18 slots§f of storage and supports up to §e4 upgrade points§f. Cannot be upgraded with specialties.

§6Crafting§f:
Surround a §bChest§f in the center with §e4× Wool§f in the corners and §e4× Leather§f on the cardinal sides.

§6Strategic Notes§f:
The Basic Backpack is your §9first storage upgrade§f. It wears in the §bchest armor slot§f, so it does not conflict with your main inventory. Use it for mining trips, exploration, and carrying multiple tool sets without dropping items on the ground.

§eTip§f: Before crafting the Basic Backpack, gather a §bstack of wool§f and a §bstack of leather§f to craft multiple backpacks at once. The Basic Backpack is also a §9required ingredient§f for tier upgrades.
